channel.title: Cryptography on CodetoCore
channel.description: Recent content in Cryptography on CodetoCore

item.title: Do I Need a Secure Element If My MCU Has a Crypto Accelerator?
item.description: Short answer: they solve different problems. A crypto accelerator makes crypto operations fast. A secure element makes sure your keys never leave the chip.

item.title: Hardware Root of Trust: What It Actually Means
item.description: Hardware Root of Trust is one of the most-used and least-understood terms in embedded security. A short, practical breakdown of what it is, what it isn't, and how to tell whether a product genuinely has one.
